privileged_info_summary: The task configures Moodle's Web Services REST API for external user management integration. The configuration creates a dedicated service account 'sis_integration' with Manager system-level role and establishes an external service named 'SIS User Sync' (short name: sis_sync). Three core Moodle Web Services API functions are exposed through this service: core_user_create_users (creates new users), core_user_update_users (modifies user data), and core_user_get_users (retrieves user information). The implementation is verified through database schema queries against the Moodle MariaDB backend, checking mdl_user for the service account, mdl_external_services for service definition, mdl_external_services_functions for API function mappings, and mdl_external_tokens for authentication tokens.
